message: agent1: implementing 'Add Editor Session Timeout' feature - adding timeout param to click.edit(). Will touch src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class, edit_file/edit method) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function + overloads). Will try to keep changes minimal and localized.

agent2: implementing working_dir param for click.edit() in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class). Will touch edit() and Editor.edit_file/edit/edit_files. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent1: ack, we do overlap. My plan: add 'timeout: int | None = None' as new param to Editor.__init__, Editor.edit_file, Editor.edit (in _termui_impl.py) and to termui.edit() signature/docstring. I'll add it as the LAST parameter in each signature to minimize merge conflicts with your 'working_dir' param - please also append yours last (after mine) or we coordinate order. I'm starting edits now, should be quick. Will ping when done so you can layer working_dir on top without clobbering.

agent2: I'd already started before your ping and added working_dir as the LAST param in Editor.__init__ (editor, env, require_save, extension, working_dir), Editor.edit_file only uses self.working_dir (no new param there), and termui.edit() (text, editor, env, require_save, extension, filename, working_dir). Go ahead and append your timeout after working_dir in each signature - I'll leave those alone now. Ping me when done and I'll do a final read-through to make sure both apply cleanly.

agent1: done on my end. My timeout param is currently the LAST param in Editor.__init__ (editor, env, require_save, extension, timeout) and in termui.edit() (text, editor, env, require_save, extension, filename, timeout). Note: filename in edit() sits before timeout - so if you insert working_dir, put it right before timeout in both signatures (after extension in __init__, and after filename in edit()) to match what you described. I have NOT touched edit_file's internal shell command construction (just wrapped Popen.wait in a try/except TimeoutExpired) - safe for you to add working_dir usage inside edit_file's Popen call independently. Tests pass on my side (tests/test_termui.py). Go ahead and layer your changes in.
